metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE workflow for healthcare administration that processes a compliance claim with full audit trail and blocks unsafe certainty.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE workflow for healthcare administration that processes a compliance claim with full audit trail and blocks unsafe certainty.
mission.success_definition: Workflow blocks execution and returns blocked state receipt.; Repair receipt includes: input hash, blocked reason, timestamp, and operator ID.; No downstream action is triggered.; Audit log entry created with full trace.

in_scope.item: Single workflow instance for healthcare_admin role, Middle East region, finance_operator initiator. Input is a compliance claim with missing context and urgent language.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Workflow blocks execution and returns blocked state receipt.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Repair receipt includes: input hash, blocked reason, timestamp, and operator ID.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Audit log entry created with full trace.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.workflow_objective: Build an SRX ACE workflow for healthcare administration that processes a compliance claim with full audit trail and blocks unsafe certainty.

workflow_phases.item: Single workflow instance for healthcare_admin role, Middle East region, finance_operator initiator. Input is a compliance claim with missing context and urgent language.

validation_gates.item: Workflow blocks execution and returns blocked state receipt.
Repair receipt includes: input hash, blocked reason, timestamp, and operator ID.
Audit log entry created with full trace.

receipt_contract.item: fields: case_id: DSS-005; blocked_reason: Unsafe compliance claim: missing context and urgent language without verification.; input_hash: sha256_of_raw_intent; timestamp: ISO8601_UTC; operator_id: finance_operator_middle_east; repair_receipt: Repair receipt recorded. No action taken.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe compliance claim detected: the input contains urgent language and missing context that could lead to regulatory violation in healthcare administration. No verified source or evidence provided for the compliance claim. Blocking to prevent unauthorized action.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
